panel.title: AMD GPU Monitor
panel.check_rocm: Ensure rocm-smi is installed and the discrete GPU is available.

settings.compact_mode_description: Show vertical mini gauges instead of percentage text.
settings.monospace_font_description: Use a fixed-width font for aligned percentage values.
settings.use_padding_description: Pad percentage values for stable bar width (horizontal bar only).
settings.metrics_description: Choose which values appear in the bar widget and panel.
settings.device_index_description: rocm-smi -d index (0 for first discrete GPU).
